page_metadata.bioconda__summary: A software pipeline designed to enable rapid and intuitive interpretation of genome editing experiments.
page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: A software pipeline designed to enable rapid and intuitive interpretation of genome editing experiments
page_metadata.biotools__summary: Analysis of deep sequencing data for rapid and intuitive interpretation of genome editing experiments. CRISPResso2 can be used to analyze genome editing outcomes using cleaving nucleases (e.g. Cas9 or Cpf1) or noncleaving nucleases (e.g. base editors).
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Analysis of deep sequencing data for rapid and intuitive interpretation of genome editing experiments. CRISPResso2 can be used to analyze genome editing outcomes using cleaving nucleases (e.g. Cas9 or Cpf1) or noncleaving nucleases (e.g. base editors).
